mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assignment_info ( employee_id, dept_id, position_id, start_date, is_primary, change_reason, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{deptId}, #{positionId}, #{startDate}, #{isPrimary}, #{changeReason}, #{status}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT a.assignment_id, a.employee_id, e.name AS employee_name, a.dept_id, d.dept_name, a.position_id, p.position_name, a.start_date, a.is_primary, a.change_reason, a.status, a.created_at FROM assignment_info a LEFT JOIN employee_info e ON a.employee_id = e.employee_id LEFT JOIN department_info d ON a.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN position_info p ON a.position_id = p.position_id WHERE a.assignment_id = #{assignmentId}

SELECT a.assignment_id, a.employee_id, e.name AS employee_name, a.dept_id, d.dept_name, a.position_id, p.position_name, a.start_date, a.is_primary, a.change_reason, a.status, a.created_at FROM assignment_info a LEFT JOIN employee_info e ON a.employee_id = e.employee_id LEFT JOIN department_info d ON a.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN position_info p ON a.position_id = p.position_id WHERE a.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND a.status = 'active' ORDER BY a.is_primary DESC, a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.assignment_id, a.employee_id, e.name AS employee_name, a.dept_id, d.dept_name, a.position_id, p.position_name, a.start_date, a.is_primary, a.change_reason, a.status, a.created_at FROM assignment_info a LEFT JOIN employee_info e ON a.employee_id = e.employee_id LEFT JOIN department_info d ON a.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN position_info p ON a.position_id = p.position_id WHERE a.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND a.status = 'active' AND a.is_primary = true LIMIT 1

SELECT a.assignment_id, a.employee_id, e.name AS employee_name, a.dept_id, d.dept_name, a.position_id, p.position_name, a.start_date, a.is_primary, a.change_reason, a.status, a.created_at FROM assignment_info a LEFT JOIN employee_info e ON a.employee_id = e.employee_id LEFT JOIN department_info d ON a.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN position_info p ON a.position_id = p.position_id WHERE a.employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE assignment_info SET is_primary = false WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND status = 'active' AND is_primary = true
UPDATE assignment_info SET status = 'inactive' WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND status = 'active'
